2024-25 Duquesne Dukes Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-19 (8-10, 9th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Dru Joyce

PS/G: 69.1 (304th of 364)

PA/G: 67.3 (49th of 364)

SRS: 1.18 (131st of 364)

SOS: 0.89 (115th of 364)
